change: scripts/scnetctl.py generated SSH config adds ControlMaster auto, ControlPath ~/.ssh/cm-xiandaobei-%C, ControlPersist 10m to login and worker Host blocks
note: Bare ssh -O check xiandaobei-worker-auto does not load the generated config on this machine; project commands should use -F /Users/keynary/.ssh/xiandaobei.generated.conf or scnetctl helpers. Worker master was prewarmed after validation with ssh -F /Users/keynary/.ssh/xiandaobei.generated.conf -MNf xiandaobei-worker-auto.
